✦ About Me

Tech-Driven.
Marketer at Heart.

I sit at the intersection of two worlds marketing & communications and data & technology and I believe that's exactly where the most impactful work happens. I don't just create campaigns that look great; I use data analytics, digital tools, and tech to make sure they actually work.

From building websites with HTML & CSS, managing stakeholder databases, and tracking KPIs with Power BI and Google Analytics to crafting press releases, running community campaigns, and hosting satellite launch events, I bring the full picture to every role I take on.

Having recently graduated with a Master of Data Analytics from the University of Adelaide, I am actively seeking opportunities as a Data Analyst or Marketing Analyst roles where I can bring together my love for data, technology, and storytelling to drive real business impact. If you're looking for someone who connects the dots between technology, data and brand growth, let's connect! 🚀

✦ Career Journey

Experience

Dec 2024 – May 2025
Marketing Analyst & PR/Communications Intern
Inovor Technologies · South Australia
  • Pitched a marketing strategy to Ben Adams (COO) backed myself and earned an extended role
  • Hosted the Buccaneer satellite launch party & Andy Thomas Space Foundation industry tours
  • Delivered press releases, newsletters & stakeholder comms across defence & commercial sectors
  • Grew social media engagement by 50% through data-driven content strategy
  • Built Inovor's rideshare program page using HTML, CSS & WordPress
May 2024 – Present
Front of House Lead / Customer Service Host
Daughter in Law · Adelaide
  • Led front-of-house operations and team management in a fast-paced hospitality environment
  • Collaborated on Fringe Festival handling front-of-house operations, menu design & creative ideas
  • Maintained high customer satisfaction through strong interpersonal and conflict resolution skills
Feb – Oct 2025
Social Media Co-ordinator (Volunteer)
ThincHer · ThincLab, University of Adelaide
  • Managed campaigns for masterclasses, social clubs & newsletters for a community of young women
  • Recognised as Social Media Co-ordinator of the Year 2025
Aug – Oct 2022
AWS Cloud Intern
F13 Technologies
  • Obtained 4 AWS certifications across cloud computing and AWS services
  • Worked on hands-on case studies; co-ordinated cross-functional project teams
